overall_assessment: PASS. CHECK-001 through CHECK-003 are valid. The worker resolved the material report-completeness gaps by adding explicit DESIGN known-limit coverage, preserving design-intended classifications, and marking the new RedisBloom module-load configuration comparison as NOT_VERIFIED rather than claiming it was run. Existing P1/P2/P3 findings, BLOCKED/NOT_VERIFIED items, and Medium-Low confidence remain visible. The final report does not turn DESIGN.md unsupported or explicitly incompatible behavior into product bugs, and it does not make a broad RedisBloom, Redis 8, RESP3, SCANDUMP/LOADCHUNK, sanitizer, or all-version compatibility claim.

check_opinion_assessment.notes: Worker added explicit report coverage for deletion unsupported, EXPANSION 1 query-cost risk, AOF rewrite allocation-failure skip-key behavior, and RedisBloom/Redis 8 same-instance mutual exclusion. Verified in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/01_DESIGN约束与结论对齐.md:22-25,38-39; doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/04_RedisBloom兼容性矩阵.md:37-46; doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/10_报告自审结果.md:24-30.

Worker added RedisBloom configuration-difference coverage and correctly limited runtime evidence. Verified in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/01_DESIGN约束与结论对齐.md:19,38; doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/04_RedisBloom兼容性矩阵.md:31,35; doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/08_测试覆盖与未覆盖.md:43.

The final report already carries the missing checked-in fixture path as GBV6-00-001. Worker did not regenerate Stage 12 path wording, but documented that decision in the process record. Verified in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/07_问题清单与复现.md:94-102 and .codex/gemini-bloom-audit/v6/agents/stage13_worker_recheck/stage_result.md:20-22.

findings.description: Stage 12 path_existence_check.md still labels the intentionally missing fixture target as PASS while noting it is missing for GBV6-00-001. This is not a blocker because the final report explicitly preserves GBV6-00-001 as an open P3 finding and worker documented that Stage 12 was not regenerated.
findings.required_worker_action: None for this closure. If Stage 12 artifacts are regenerated later, classify this row as EXPECTED_MISSING_FINDING_TARGET or equivalent instead of plain PASS.

design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Correctly not treated as a product bug; P1 LOADCHUNK self-protocol defects remain separate.

design_known_limits_coverage.topic: command-AOF without RDB preamble is not cross-implementation compatible
design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Correctly scoped to gemini private LOADCHUNK command-AOF and production RDB-preamble requirement.

design_known_limits_coverage.topic: live replication command stream can produce BF.CARD drift in high false-positive / EXPANSION 1 cases
design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Covered as membership-safe cardinality drift, not as RDB/fullsync incompatibility.
Correctly represented as an accounting difference.
Added by worker and not treated as a product defect.

design_known_limits_coverage.topic: EXPANSION 1 can increase query cost because more subfilters are checked
design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Added by worker with production guidance to use EXPANSION 2 or higher.

design_known_limits_coverage.topic: AOF rewrite allocation failure can skip keys
design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Correctly described as an extreme OOM / non-RDB-preamble rewrite risk, separate from GBV6-07-002.

design_known_limits_coverage.topic: gemini-bloom cannot co-exist in one Redis instance with RedisBloom or Redis 8 built-in Bloom
design_known_limits_coverage.notes: Now explicit as an operational mutual-exclusion limit rather than an unverified compatibility promise.
Report classifies the design difference as DESIGN_INTENDED / PARTIAL and explicitly marks new RedisBloom module-load runtime comparison as NOT_VERIFIED.

acceptance_decision: Accepted. No further worker changes required. The report-only worker changes satisfy the check handoff, preserve existing risk posture, and keep DESIGN.md boundaries explicit without overclaiming compatibility.
